name: aramo-core
description: Aramo Core monorepo (modular monolith). See README.md and doc/00-README.md.

scripts.pact:consumer: vitest run --root pact/consumers/ats-thin && vitest run --root pact/consumers/auth-service-consumer
scripts.prisma:generate: prisma generate --schema libs/consent/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/identity/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma generate --schema libs/auth-storage/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:validate: prisma validate --schema libs/audit/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/auth/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/auth-storage/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/common/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/consent/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/engagement/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/entrustability/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/events/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/evidence/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/examination/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/identity/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/ingestion/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/matching/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/skills-taxonomy/prisma/schema.prisma && prisma validate --schema libs/talent/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.openapi:validate: swagger-cli validate openapi/common.yaml && swagger-cli validate openapi/ats.yaml && swagger-cli validate openapi/portal.yaml && swagger-cli validate openapi/ingestion.yaml && swagger-cli validate openapi/auth.yaml
scripts.openapi:lint: redocly lint openapi/common.yaml openapi/ats.yaml openapi/portal.yaml openapi/ingestion.yaml openapi/auth.yaml
